{{CargoRelic
|name=Morse's Telegraph
|rank=SS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=08-18
|source=Fragment Crafting (5.2%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Wishing (0.19%), Tool Chest (1%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), TECH Master Scrolls (9.2%)
|description=On Aug 18, 1837 AD, Morse invented the world's first telegraph that was then widely used in America.

That day, Morse combined an array of already existing inventions to create the telegraph. Morse's only original creation was an efficient code, but it took him years to convince Washington to let him demonstrate it. He sent a telegraph to his companions, and the companion was able to send the same information back to him. The telegraph's success took America by storm.
|fame=60
|art=53
|fth=69
|civ=61
|tech=104
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail RUSH +20<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +4%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss2=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail RUSH +30<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +6%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss3=Snail ATK +40<br>Snail RUSH +40<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +8%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Snail RUSH +60<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +12%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss5=Snail ATK +80<br>Snail RUSH +80<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +16%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss6=Snail ATK +110<br>Snail RUSH +110<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +22%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1
|ss7=Snail ATK +110<br>Snail RUSH +110<br>Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +22%<br>In the Ad Shop, Ads available per day +1<br>Snail RUSH +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail DEF +120 each round
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, HP Regen +1,200
|skill3=[[File:Timemachine skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Time Machine: Time Machine Max Cap +30%
}}
==Mirage: Regress Signal==
TECH Gems +3, Travel Speedup +8h
{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy
!Unlocked at
!Recommended Power
!ATK
!DEF
!HP
!Weakness
|-
|Smart Phone
|★★★☆☆☆
|648K
|16,860
|11,147
|115,147
|TECH 7,044
|-
|Cellphone
|★★★★★☆
|1.56M
|32,497
|21,484
|381,577
|TECH 9,967
|-
|Telephone
|★★★★★★
|3.48M
|54,696
|36,161
|949,315
|TECH 13,961
|-
|Morse's Telegraph
|Awakened
|7.14M
|84,146
|55,631
|2,082,391
|TECH 17,769
|}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Orange Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Orange TECH Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Output Boost]]
[[Category:Ad Shop Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:HP Regen]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:Time Machine Output Boost]]
[[Category:Organ Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Output Boost]]
